positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of diverse woodland creatures (fox, owl, raccoon, deer) gathered around a glowing celestial bonfire. The style should be contemporary, highly detailed children's book illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elements, featuring thick, confident black line work and a limited, earthy color palette of deep sapphire blues, moss greens, warm burnt oranges, and ivory. Use a centralized composition with distinct silhouettes against a stylized, patterned night sky. The bonfire provides strong, dramatic backlighting, casting playful, exaggerated shadows and creating a strong sense of magic and community. The design must be perfectly centered and high-contrast for optimal apparel printing, suitable for a wide print area.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low resolution, photographic, realistic, messy, dull color
